title: Pulisic training solo in race to be fit vs. Austra...
summary: Christian Pulisic is training separately from the USMNT squad as he recovers from a calf injury sustained during recent matches. His fitness status remains uncertain as the team prepares for an upcoming match against Australia.
content: United States national team attacker Christian Pulisic continued to train apart from the main group at Wednesday's training session, as he looks to recover from a calf injury he first sustained last week, and aggravated in last Friday's 4-1 over Paraguay.

zh.title: 普利西奇单独训练，竭力为对澳大利亚比赛恢复健康
zh.summary: 克里斯蒂安·普利西奇与美国国家队分开训练，正在从近期比赛中的小腿伤势中恢复。当球队为即将到来的对澳大利亚的比赛做准备时，他的健康状况仍不确定。

title: Konaté completes switch to Madrid from Liverpool
summary: Defender Ibrahima Konaté has completed his transfer from Liverpool to Real Madrid in a significant defensive addition. The move provides the Spanish club with reinforcement for the upcoming season.
content: Ibrahima Konaté has completed his move to Real Madrid from Liverpool.

zh.title: 科纳特完成从利物浦到马德里的转会

title: Sources: Liverpool beat Newcastle to Muñoz deal
summary: Liverpool has beaten Newcastle United to the signing of Spanish international Víctor Muñoz from Osasuna, securing the winger before Newcastle could finalize the deal. The transfer represents a significant mid-season acquisition for the Merseyside club.
content: Liverpool are set to sign Spain international Víctor Muñoz from Osasuna after hijacking his switch to Newcastle United, sources told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息称：利物浦击败纽卡斯尔签下穆尼奥斯
zh.summary: 利物浦击败纽卡斯尔联队，从奥萨苏纳签下了西班牙国脚维克托·穆尼奥斯，在纽卡斯尔完成交易前确保了这位边锋。这笔转会是利物浦赛季中期的重要引援。

title: Canada's Davies fit to face Qatar in World Cup
summary: Canada captain Alphonso Davies is fit to return for Thursday's World Cup match against Qatar after recovering from a hamstring injury. His availability represents a major boost to the Canadian squad after missing their opening fixture.
content: Canada captain Alphonso Davies will be available to play on Thursday against Qatar after he missed his team's World Cup opener while recovering from a hamstring injury.

zh.title: 加拿大队长戴维斯伤愈，将出战世界杯对卡塔尔之战
zh.summary: 加拿大队长阿方索·戴维斯从腘绳肌伤病中康复，确认适合参加周四对卡塔尔的世界杯比赛。他的复出对加拿大队是重大提振，此前他因伤缺席了首场比赛。

title: Motherwell appoint Johansson as Askou successor
summary: Motherwell Football Club appointed 35-year-old Swedish manager Alfred Johansson to succeed their previous leader. Johansson aims to continue building on the team's successful performance from the previous season.
content: Alfred Johansson is the new manager at Motherwell, with the 35-year-old Swede aiming to build on the success of last season at Fir Park.

title: The celebration photo that sums up my relationship with Mbappe - Giroud

content: France's World Cup winner Olivier Giroud explains why iconic Les Bleus striker Kylian Mbappe is misunderstood, and seen as arrogant when he's not.

title: This was an England we haven't seen for years - and it was fun

title: 'Chip on shoulder' may help Bellingham to best form

content: Jude Bellingham says the external "noise" around his place in the England team may help him find his best form during the World Cup.

title: Drone brought down near South Korea training base

content: The Mexican military reportedly intercepts and brings down an unregistered drone seen flying over South Korea's training base before their Group A match with co-hosts Mexico on Friday.

zh.title: 无人机在韩国训练基地附近被击落
